A '''Sith training saber''' was a practice weapon used by [[Sith apprentice/Legends|students]] at the [[Sith Academy (Korriban)|Sith academy]] on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]].

==Description==
[[Sith training|Training]] sabers had [[Durasteel/Legends|durasteel]] blades with blunt edges, and were balanced to mimic real [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]]. The blade of a training saber was covered with millions of microscopic toxin-filled barbs taken from [[pelko bug]]s that would cause burns to the skin on contact and temporarily paralyze the surrounding area to mimic the effect of losing a [[Limb/Legends|limb]].<ref name="PoD">''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]'' {{Ab|Darth Bane: Path of Destruction (audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
*''[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II]]''
*''[[Fate of the Jedi: Omen]]'' {{Ab|Fate of the Jedi: Omen (audiobook)}}
